event: provisional diagnosis of acute febrile illness with undifferentiated fever
workup to rule out tropical infections
Scrub typhus antigen card was positive
Scrub immunoglobulin M (IgM) (solid-phase immunochromatographic assay) was positive
other body fluid cultures were sterile
mild fatty infiltration of the liver
developed weakness of both lower limbs
shifted to the Intensive Care Unit (ICU)
Magnetic resonance imaging (MRI) of the brain was done which was without any abnormality
improvement in weakness of all four limbs
aggressive limb and chest physiotherapy was continued
ollowed up regularly in the outpatient department
